## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to align on content strategy and prioritize focus areas for Zuplo's SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on building domain authority and targeting niche, low-competition keywords for better conversion](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Explore programmatic SEO opportunities, like creating API directories and how-to guides](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Implement subtle, non-salesy product mentions and CTAs in content to maintain shareability](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Calibrate content creation process with two initial articles, then scale up production](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Recent content not ranking as highly as hoped, likely due to low domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Competing against large companies with high domain authority in the API space](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Opportunity to target niche, low-competition keywords for better conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Explore programmatic SEO with API directories and how-to guides for other APIs](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

### Content Strategy and Prioritization

  - [Balance high-difficulty keywords with safer, low-difficulty options](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Focus on understanding ICP deeply and creating good user experiences](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Expect notable traffic spike around month 3 of high-volume content production](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Implement a mix of content types: high-quality pillar pages with supporting cluster content](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Content Creation Workflow

  - [Use GitHub as CMS, potentially with a custom tool for easier content uploads](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)
  - [Implement calibration articles to refine tone, structure, and templating](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2026.0)
  - [Utilize Airtable for content planning and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2193.0)
  - [Incorporate subtle product mentions, social proof, and CTAs in content](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2428.0)

### SEO Optimization Techniques

  - [Focus on user intent and providing valuable, non-salesy content](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Implement internal linking strategy and FAQ sections for additional keyword targeting](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Explore answer engine optimization for emerging search platforms (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)

### Content Distribution and Backlink Building

  - [Syndicate content to platforms like Dev.TO with canonical links to Zuplo domain](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2690.0)
  - [Continue backlink building efforts to maintain and improve domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2796.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Adrian to select two calibration articles for initial content creation](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2309.0)
  - [Jenn to begin work on calibration articles and share for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2031.0)
  - [Adrian to provide examples of preferred content templates and structures](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Explore options for GitHub-based content management workflow](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2106.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy based on performance data and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/N3cceJQiEyaoDd-DWfHCFXUZTXZofAwY?tab=summary&timestamp=2908.0)
